case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. DAVID PESSAR DBA ELITE MANAGEMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS DAVID PESSAR DBA ELITE MANAGEMENT COMPANY TO BE ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO CORRECT DOE DEFENDANT NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC $20,818.82 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,188.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF JUDGEMNT ENTERED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. SERVED NOV-28-2011, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ELITE MANAGEMENT HOLDINGS LLC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-29-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-14-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-29-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
